display_title: Slay the Spire 2:This or That?
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 This or That?.png}} == Options == {{Frame|This}} {{TS|negative||Lose 6 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Gain 57 {{2|Gold}}.}}
{{Frame|That}} Add {{C|Clumsy||2}} to your {{2|Deck}}. {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relic}}.}} == Dialogue ==
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a {{TS|gold||suspicious bag of riches}} and a clearly {{TS|purple||cursed relic}}. {{TS|blue||"This... or That?"}} a scratched-up voice whispers from below.
{{Frame|This}}
You grab the bag and as soon as you do, a {{TS|blue|shake|THIRD hand}} appears and clutches at you!! After a {{TS|red|shake|frantic struggle}}, it releases—the arms and the hole have vanished.
{{Frame|That}}
You grab the {{TS|purple||Cursed Relic}}. As soon as you grasp it, shackles materialize on your wrists. You hear a {{TS|blue||ghostly laughter}} and a bright {{TS|orange||plume of fire}} fills your vision! The hole and arms are gone.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
